name: Application Status Page
summary: Allows users to check the current status of their submitted application using a reference number.
whenToUse: Services where applications are processed asynchronously
Users need to track progress after submission
Reduce support calls asking 'where is my application?'

structure.lookup: Reference number input field with lookup button
structure.status: Clear status indicator (submitted, in review, approved, etc.)
structure.nextSteps: Actions user should take based on current status

requiredElements: Clear status display (use GoabCallout with appropriate type)

adspIntegration.pattern: Fetch status via API, display in UI

imports: import { GoabOneColumnLayout, GoabAppHeader, GoabPageBlock, GoabInput, GoabButton, GoabCallout, GoabAppFooter } from '@abgov/react-components';

notes: Consider authentication for sensitive status info
Show helpful message if reference number not found
Include contact info if user needs help
Timestamp helps set expectations on data freshness
